author: nomarcub
description: Image context menus (mostly on right click): Copy to clipboard, Open in default app, Show in system explorer, Reveal file in navigation, Open in new tab.

manifest.author: NomarCub
manifest.description: Copy to clipboard, Copy URL, Open in default app, Show in system explorer, Reveal file in navigation, Open in new tab, Rename context menus for images.
manifest.name: Image Context Menus

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
minor internal changes, see https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/70, https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/71, https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/72

update readme with link to new official Obsidian Community site: [Obsidian Plugins - Image Context menus](https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/copy-url-in-preview).

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/compare/1.12.1...1.12.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- fix duplicated menu items in obsidian v1.12.0 editing view in https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/69


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/compare/1.12.0...1.12.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- add copy external URL functionality in #68, closes #67

internal changes
- tsconfig: replace 'baseUrl' with 'paths' by @Rikiub in https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/65
- Split helpers.ts in modular files under utils/ by @Rikiub in https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/66


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/compare/1.11.2...1.12.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- fix #58 - handle encoding in paths from URLs, fixes paths with spaces
- handle some clipboard fallbacks better
- internal
    - refactor external url image download and clipboard copying
    - add Biome to linting command and fine-tune rules
    - bump Node version minimum, use TypeScript for build files when possible. For ESLint, see: https://github.com/eslint/eslint/issues/19357
    - update dependencies
    - see https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/63

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/compare/1.11.1...1.11.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Local GIF copy support for Android by @Rikiub in https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/62 - partially addresses https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/issues/19
* internal
  * Fix eslint for deno https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/57
  * Add Biome formatter and reformat code https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/56
  * refactors https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/59, https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/60, https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/61

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/compare/1.11.0...1.11.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- fix mobile screen sliding copy bug and improve parity with desktop, closes https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/issues/48
- add rename context menu, closes https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/issues/53
- internal
    - major refactors and simplifications for mobile
    - remove the temporary file downloading mechanism for mobile
    - add release GitHub action
    - bump version to 1.11.0

## New Contributors
* @Rikiub made their first contribution in https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/pull/55

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/compare/1.10.0...1.11.0

- fix menu on canvas, add proper canvas menu
- native open in new tab (closes #39)

- add sections

releases.author: NomarCub
releases.description:
remove copy link URL functionality - see #34

as per the readme:

> This plugin used to be called "Copy Image and URL context menu". It had link URL copying functionality (see [1.5.2](https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/tree/1.5.2) and prior), but that was removed when it was included in Obsidian 1.5.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-copy-url-in-preview/compare/1.5.2...1.6.0
